title: gooddreams.
description: adds liminal-esque dimensions into your minecraft world once you sleep.
body:
***1.80.0 is STILL being worked on - it will be the biggest update for now once released!***





***Just another Wonderland.jar slop mod for now.***


_Heavily inspired by **Wonderland.jar** by **Alexander25.k**_



This mod adds _dream/liminal-like_ dimensions once you sleep in the overworld via a bed. Adds _2 entities_ in some of the dimensions you'll enter. Like Wonderland, this mod is based off of liminal spaces similarly to the backrooms. There are **27** dimensions in total as of 1.46.5, and will have _more_ in **future** updates!
Every sequence you enter will become _less_ and _less_ safer the more you traverse.




<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

OST if you want to listen. (But only one can play in game as of now, the others are just noises for the mod.) - https://youtu.be/gatqwM1JpxY?si=Y7Q_4KBHXthnuJeC
_I suggest not playing around with the mod's sound commands mid-game (/playsound) and all that, sooo yeah._

</details>

_Report any bugs down in the comments of the OST videos of Gooddreams's soundtrack, one listed above, but: don't report a bug/ask a question about the mod in an unrelated video, only on the videos relating to Gooddreams to avoid confusion in later unrelated uploads. - @ my youtube channel if you've made a video on this mod if you want so i can observe the mod's performance from your guys's perspective._


Bugs in the mod i can't fix are mostly where _some_ dimensions can be really **LAGGY**, the most obvious one being "**The_Point**" as it generates water from y level 80 - all the way down to bedrock *whilst water flows all the way down with it*. This mod is recommended to play at _low render distance levels_ from the range of 2-8 (_Some dimensions can be above that limit if lucky enough_). Also recommended to play with performance mods if it's _that_ bad. - _from Playtesting experience's_

Mod is a _slow-burner_ like _TBS & Wonderland_, but only in it's dimensions. It's a **guaranteed access** to being sent into the dimensions once the player is sleeping in the overworld.
-_Make sure to have ambient noises on by default in Sounds._
-_And when you're making a video on this mod, please put something from the mod itself in the thumbnails instead of having random ARG creatures that do not belong in Minecraft, okay?_

_keepInventory is recommend to be on/set to true if you're playing the mod to prevent lack of progression._

_The mod does not end with ".jar", it's just a period, that's it. It's just called "gooddreams" - no ".jar" or anything at the end of the title_

------------------

**Credits**

2. _M_
3. _TheMangoFruitTea_ (First person to make a vid on the mod so yeah!)
